markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content drafts and formalize the review process.](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Review Workflow:** A tiered review process was adopted to prevent rework: Sev (PMM) for technical accuracy → Kirsten (Brand) for messaging → Ric (Brand) for formatting.](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [**SEO Strategy Confirmed:** Individual articles targeting specific keywords (e.g., "Pass the Hash") will be maintained, as combining them would dilute SEO value.](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**New Brand Source:** The updated SpecterOps "About Us" page is the new definitive source for brand messaging, replacing the "State of APM" e-book.](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [**Engagement Decision:** As the 8-week sprint ends, a decision on continuing the engagement is due next week.](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)

## Topics

### Content Review & Feedback

  - [Sev reviewed two drafts, providing feedback that led to revisions.](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [**Feedback Quality:** The feedback was highly valuable for improving technical accuracy and positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [**Key Messaging:** All content must emphasize SpecterOps' core concepts: "identity at rest" and "identity in transit."](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [**SEO Rationale:**](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Sev proposed combining related attack blogs (e.g., "Pass the Hash," "Cached Credentials") into one.](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Aida clarified that separate articles target distinct keywords, which is critical for SEO performance.](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
      - [**Decision:** Maintain individual articles. A separate, broader "credential theft" overview could be created later.](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### New Content Review Process

  - [A formal review process was defined to improve efficiency and prevent rework.](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [**Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
    1.  [**PMM Review (Sev):** Technical accuracy, messaging, positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
    2.  [**Brand Review (Kirsten):** Overall brand alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
    3.  [**Formatting Review (Ric):** Final check on brand assets, graphics, and layout.](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [**Implementation:** Aida will configure Airtable automations to enforce this sequence.](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)

### Production & Cadence

  - [**Cadence:** The goal is 5 blogs per week.](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [**SEO Impact:** Aida confirmed this volume is not "spammy" and will not negatively impact search indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [**Visuals:** The "purple" cover images shared on Slack are approved for all new articles.](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)

### Engagement Status

  - [**Sprint:** Week 7 of an 8-week sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
  - [**Decision:** A decision on continuing the engagement is due next week.](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
  - [**Ownership:** This decision is Shaq's; the team will coordinate with him.](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
      - [Update Airtable automations to reflect the new review workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
      - [Tag Sev for review once current drafts are revised.](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [**Sev:**](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
      - [Review the 3 remaining drafts by EOD Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
      - [Review the 2 revised drafts once tagged.](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [**SpecterOps Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
      - [Provide a decision on continuing the engagement next week.](https://fathom.video/share/QL4PAp5bKyLy9N36iDoZ2pnEEKah16xe?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
